findings_added.title: Round-5 NEW deep-nesting precedent: shared examples L5 sub-domain peer to sister L5 sub-domains (§6.3.5.7.3 Microbiology Specimen/Microbiology Susceptibility Examples sib=3 peer to §6.3.5.7.1 MB sib=1 + §6.3.5.7.2 MS sib=2 under §6.3.5.7 group container)
findings_added.scope: p.256 ig34_p0256_a009 §6.3.5.7.3 L5 HEADING + downstream Example 1/2/3 L6 chain p.256/257/259
findings_added.parent_assigned: §6.3.5.7 Microbiology Domains (L4 group canonical full-form; NEW6.b L4 self-parent-NOT EFFECTIVE 6th cumulative)
findings_added.rule_application: Extends NEW7 deep-nesting model (round-4 NEW O-P1-75 first L5-RESTART-under-L4-group-container precedent for §6.3.5.7.1 MB) with NEW round-5 case: when a L4 group container has multiple sister L5 sub-domains AND those sub-domains share examples, the shared examples can be promoted to a peer L5 sub-domain (e.g. §6.3.5.7.3) rather than living as L6 internal to either sister. Different from individual L4 sub-domain case (e.g. §6.3.5.6 LB) where Examples is L6 sib=4 internal to that single sub-domain. The shared-examples-L5 pattern thus introduces a new branch in the NEW7 deep-nesting decision tree: L4-group-container case with N sister L5 sub-domains (where N ≥ 2 and they share examples) ⇒ Examples L5 sib=N+1 peer to sisters; vs N=1 single sub-domain ⇒ Examples L5 sib=4 internal.
findings_added.v1_4_candidate: Codify NEW7 chain L4 group-container branch sub-rule: 'L4 group container with N sister L5 sub-domains sharing examples ⇒ shared Examples promoted to L5 sib=N+1 peer; each Example M HEADING hl=6 sib=1..N RESTART under shared Examples L5'. Mirrors O-P1-75 round-4 codification (L5 RESTART under L4 group container) extended to round-5 (shared-Examples-L5-as-peer).
